_meta.business_target: Meat Center — butcher / meat market, Lancaster, SC
_meta.researched_by: Claude (intake research for one-page Astro site)

verification_tag_legend.uncertain: found, but sources conflict OR may be conflated with a different/closed business
verification_tag_legend.not_found: could not be confirmed anywhere; see open_questions in brief.md

_meta.CRITICAL_DISAMBIGUATION: UPDATED 2026-06-18 after browsing the LIVE Facebook page: facebook.com/TheMeatCenter IS the target business — its Intro lists '657 Lancaster bypass east, Lancaster, SC' and '(803) 286-5077', shows 'Open now', 43K followers, 98% recommend (507 reviews). Earlier search engines wrongly conflated it with a SEPARATE, CLOSED business ('Buford Meat Station' / 'Buford Meat Center', 4457 Pageland Hwy, phone 803-283-4121 — Yelp/BBB show out-of-business). CONCLUSION: trust facebook.com/TheMeatCenter as a FIRST-PARTY source for the target. The closed Pageland Hwy business is unrelated and must not be mixed in.
_meta.FACEBOOK_NOTE: Facebook shows logged-out visitors only ONE recent post plus the Photos grid (login wall). I did NOT log in. Content in 'facebook_first_party' below came from that one public post and the Photos tab auto-generated alt text; older post history was not accessible. IMPORTANT: 'SINCE 1978' seen on a graphic = the Certified Angus Beef BRAND (founded 1978), NOT the shop's founding year. Facebook image URLs are temporary scontent.fbcdn.net links that expire and are NOT licensed for republishing — get originals from the owner.
_meta.do_not_use: ButcherBud listing (butcherbud.com) lists generic template services (dry-aging, house-made sausage, whole-animal processing, etc.) that are NOT specific to this business. These were excluded and must not be presented as facts.

display_name.notes: Aggregators also render it 'The Meat Center', but that 'The' form is associated with the separate closed Pageland Hwy business. Confirm exact preferred name with owner.

tagline_or_self_description.notes: No owner-authored tagline located (no official website or confirmed social page for the target). Aggregator 'about' blurbs are AI-generated from reviews, not the business's own words — not usable as a tagline.

year_established.value: Conflicting: ~1987 (Facebook 'Family Owned for 39 years' as of 2026) vs 1992 (Buzzfile)
year_established.notes: Facebook Intro says 'Family Owned for 39 years!' (=> ~1987). Buzzfile says founded 1992. These disagree by ~5 years. 'Family owned' itself is first-party confirmed; the exact year is not. Do NOT print a specific founding year until the owner confirms.

family_owned.notes: First-party: Facebook Intro states 'Family Owned for 39 years!' Safe to describe as a family-owned shop; just don't pin the exact number of years.

story.notes: No founding story published. See open_questions.

owner_names.value: Billy C. Everall (listed by aggregators as owner) — but DECEASED Dec 22, 2025; current ownership unknown
owner_names.notes: Buzzfile lists 'Billy Everall, Owner' against phone 803-286-5077. His Dec 2025 obituary calls him 'former owner of The Meat Center.' The shop is clearly still operating (Facebook active June 2026, reviews May 2026) and Facebook says 'Family Owned' — so it continues under family/new ownership. DO NOT name a current owner on the website. Describe it as 'family owned' only. Confirm who currently owns/operates the business.

address.value: 657 Lancaster Bypass E (Hwy 9 Bypass E), Lancaster, SC 29720
address.notes: 657 is the most common and is geo-confirmed. Conflicting street numbers exist: Buzzfile says 622 Hwy 9 Byp E; Whereorg says 662 Lancaster Byp E. Confirm exact number with owner before printing.

geo.notes: Same coordinates on Loc8NearMe and the Wheree Google Maps embed.

google_maps_place.notes: Extracted from the Google Maps embed on Wheree. Confirm it resolves to the correct active listing.

website.notes: No existing official website (this project is the first).

social_links.notes: Facebook is CONFIRMED as the target's (Intro shows 657 Lancaster Bypass East + 803-286-5077, 43K followers, active). Safe to link. Instagram @the.meatcenter is likely the target's too but was NOT re-verified — confirm before linking it.

nearby_landmark.value: Retail strip on Lancaster Bypass E / Hwy 9 Bypass; neighboring businesses include AutoZone (615), Mully's restaurant (695), Energy Center Appliance (667)
nearby_landmark.notes: Neighbor addresses listed by Wheree's 'around you' section. Useful for a 'how to find us' line; verify before publishing.

parking_notes.notes: Likely a strip-mall/storefront lot given the location, but not verified. Confirm with owner.

conflicts: Saturday is uncertain: Loc8NearMe and Wheree say Sat 9 AM-5 PM; Chamber of Commerce says Sat 9 AM-6 PM. CONFIRM Saturday closing time with owner.

confirmed_products.notes: Beef/pork/chicken plus produce/breads/sides recur across reviews. Facebook (first-party) adds 'Fresh Seafood', Certified Angus Beef, and Wagyu (in bundle graphics). All now well-supported.

value: Inspected daily by SC Meat and Poultry Inspectors
confirmed_services.notes: Bundle/box deals and weekly specials cited in reviews AND on Facebook. 'In-store pickup' and 'Price Range $' are listed on the FB page. 'Inspected daily by SC Meat and Poultry Inspectors' is stated in the FB Intro (first-party).

fresh_never_frozen.value: Markets meats as fresh daily / never frozen
fresh_never_frozen.notes: First-party Facebook bundle graphic uses 'FRESH EVERY DAY' and 'FRESH — you can never trust FROZEN'. Safe to echo this as their own marketing message; attribute as their claim, not an independent fact.

custom_cuts.notes: Aggregator FAQ says staff accommodate custom cut requests, but this reads as templated boilerplate; not seen on Facebook. Confirm with owner.

not_found_confirm_with_owner: Holiday or pre-order programs (note: they DO run holiday-themed bundles, e.g. Father's Day; confirm a formal pre-order process)

facebook_first_party.page_stats: 43K followers; 98% recommend (507 reviews); Butcher Shop; Price Range $; In-store pickup; 'Open now' as of 2026-06-18.
taglines_their_own_words: Quality Meats. Fresh Seafood. Great Prices.
Premium Quality. Great Value. Fresh Every Day.
Great Meals. Great Prices. All Week Long!
Fresh — you can never trust frozen. Perfect for families.

example_bundle_deal.headline: Bundle Deal — $99.99
contents_as_listed: 2 x 12oz Certified Angus New York strips
example_bundle_deal.notes: Transcribed from a Facebook promo graphic (auto-generated alt text). VERIFY exact contents and the $99.99 price with the owner before publishing — promo pricing changes weekly. Good proof that they run premium, specific bundle deals.

post_style_observed: Engagement / giveaway posts (e.g. a 'guessing game' for a free Father's Day Bundle)
Seasonal & holiday tie-ins (Father's Day bundles; Memorial Day patriotic post 'All gave some...')
Weekly bundle/special promo graphics featuring Certified Angus Beef and Wagyu
facebook_first_party.usage_guidance: Use these as PROOF POINTS and copy inspiration. The taglines are the business's own words and are safe to echo. Treat specific prices/contents as time-sensitive — present as 'example bundle' or pull live, and confirm with owner.

pricing.value: No standing price list public. One first-party example: a 'Bundle Deal' at $99.99 (premium beef bundle, see facebook_first_party.example_bundle_deal).
pricing.notes: Reviews describe prices as very affordable ('half' of grocery stores). Facebook shows specific weekly bundle pricing (e.g. $99.99) but these rotate. Do NOT hardcode prices as permanent; present bundles as examples / 'see our latest specials on Facebook' and confirm with owner.

rating.value: Approx. 4.7 / 5 stars on Google; 98% recommend (507 reviews) on Facebook
rating.notes: Google rating 4.7 consistent across sources. Google review COUNT varies by aggregator: ~489 (Chamber) vs 723 (ButcherBud) — treat as approximate; pull the live count at build time. Facebook separately shows '98% recommend (507 Reviews)'.

value: High-quality meats with a large variety of cuts
Prices customers consider very low / great value (often compared favorably to grocery stores)
Good bulk 'box' deals and weekly specials that bring people back
Worth driving to from out of town
Occasional mentions of recent price increases
Occasional stock limits / selection gaps during busy times
recurring_complaint_themes_paraphrased.notes: Minor and infrequent; drawn from aggregated review summaries, not individually verified.

candidate_testimonials_CONFIRM_BEFORE_US.notes: Each is <=15 words. Reviewer names come from Chamber's republished Google reviews; Loc8NearMe quotes had no names attached. CONFIRM authenticity, attribution, and permission before publishing any of these.

value.quote: Great selection of high quality meats and very reasonable prices.
The store is very clean and well organized. The employees are very nice.
So clean and prices are half of what they are anywhere else!

brand_tone_read.value: Old-school, no-frills hometown meat market: a small family-style butcher counter focused on quality cuts at honest, beat-the-grocery-store prices, known for bulk box deals and weekly specials. The vibe is friendly, clean, and community-rooted — a longtime local staple rather than a trendy craft butcher.
brand_tone_read.notes: Synthesized from recurring review themes; design/copy should lean warm, plainspoken, value-forward. See brief.md for full read.
